def transform(xs):
    xs = list(xs)
    xs = [x % 2 for x in xs]
    xs = (xs[2 % len(xs):] + xs[:2 % len(xs)]) if xs else []
    xs = [sum(xs[:i + 1]) for i in range(len(xs))]
    return xs

def transform(xs):
    xs = list(xs)
    xs = [-x for x in xs]
    xs = sorted(xs, reverse=True)
    xs = (xs[2 % len(xs):] + xs[:2 % len(xs)]) if xs else []
    return xs
